event: Two figures meeting at a gate in the countryside
description: A painting showing two figures meeting at a wooden gate in a rural winter landscape. On the left, a man wearing a blue beret and dark coat carries what appears to be a walking stick. On the right, a woman in dark clothing with a white headcovering stands on the other side of the gate. Behind them, bare trees rise against a colorful sky, and a green and brown landscape stretches into the background. The brushwork is bold and the colors vivid despite the winter setting.
